case_title: TRAVERS, BETTY VS GUTIERREZ ANTONIO,OWNER WHEELCHAIRS OF SAN MATEO

docket_entries.description: TO PLAINTIFF, WITHIN 30 DAYS OF RECEIPT OF THIS ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAVERS, BETTY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ ANTONIO,OWNER WHEELCHAIRS OF SAN MATEO PLFT TO RETURN HANDICAP SCOOTER PURCHASED FROM DEFT TO DEFT & DEFT TO REFUND PURCHASE PRICE OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TRAVERS, BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ ANTONIO,OWNER WHEELCHAIRS OF SAN MATEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
